groups.reason: Video/QuickTime read support is not implemented. These tags come from .MOV/.mov files (QuickTime containers that also embed EXIF/XMP/derived tags); exif-oxide does not parse video, and real ExifTool is the permanent fallback (CLAUDE.md Tier policy).
RIFF/WebP container read support is not implemented; these tags come from .webp (RIFF) files exif-oxide does not parse.

HEIC/HEIF EXIF extraction gap: exif-oxide extracts zero EXIF tags from certain HEIC files (e.g. IMG_9757.heic: 0 of 32 supported EXIF tags), so these otherwise-supported tags are missing for that format. Needs HEIC metadata-extraction investigation.
groups.reference: _todo/20260701-P0-strategic-review-program.md (Follow-up candidates — untriaged HEIC extraction; needs its own TPP)

groups.reason: RAW EXIF extraction gap: these otherwise-supported EXIF tags are not extracted from the sampled RAW files (per-format IFD chaining / offset gaps).

Binary-payload extraction (embedded previews, thumbnails, JpgFromRaw, PreviewTIFF) is not implemented across these formats, so exif-oxide omits the tag (or, for Composite:PreviewImage, over-emits one vs ExifTool).
Manufacturer MakerNotes extraction gaps: exif-oxide does not yet decode these maker-note tags (or over-emits one), pending per-manufacturer codegen extraction.
XMP extraction / value-conversion gaps: these XMP tags are not extracted, or not converted (incl. GPS DMS->decimal ToDegrees), for the sampled files.
groups.reference: _todo/20260701-P0-strategic-review-program.md Follow-up candidates (d) XMP GPS ToDegrees + #7 XMP value conversion

groups.reason: IPTC/XMP-adjacent metadata (IPTC:, XML:, MWG:) extraction gaps: exif-oxide does not yet extract these tags from the sampled files.
Name-keyed COMPOSITE_TAGS registry collision (GPS vs Sony vs QuickTime defs) suppresses these GPS composites on non-video files. Fix is to make the registry first-buildable-wins.
Composite lens identification (LensID/LensSpec/LensType/Lens) depends on MakerNotes lens tables exif-oxide has not fully extracted, so the composite is missing for the sampled files.

Composite:DateTimeOriginal is emitted where ExifTool suppresses it: codegen drops ExifTool's composite Condition (Exif.pm:4952) and orchestration never evaluates it. Needs a condition field on CompositeTagDef + runtime evaluation.
Composite tag missing because a required dependency tag is not yet extracted for the sampled file (RAW/HEIC EXIF or MakerNotes gaps upstream).

Known distinct-root-cause type mismatches: IPTC:Keywords list accumulation, EXIF:XPKeywords UCS-2 decode, EXIF:GPSProcessingMethod encoding-prefix strip, MakerNotes:Categories (Canon), XMP:Source apostrophe truncation.
groups.reference: _todo/20260701-P0-strategic-review-program.md Follow-up candidates (c) the remaining type mismatches

groups.reason: File-type disambiguation bug: exif-oxide misidentifies some Nikon NEF files as NRW, so File:FileType/FileTypeExtension/MIMEType diverge. Untriaged; needs investigation.
groups.reference: _todo/20260701-P0-strategic-review-program.md (Follow-up candidates — untriaged file-type detection; needs investigation)
